Shift timeline

Operational checkpoints pulled from the live store feed.

Today
06:45

Batch prep finished

Espresso beans dialed in at 19.4g dose and cold brew taps rotated for lunch volume.

09:10

Rush threshold crossed

Mobile pickup queue hit 14 concurrent drinks. Extra bar assigned to pickup handoff.

12:35

Inventory alert triggered

Oat milk crossed the replenishment threshold with less than one week of projected stock left.
